title: Filter by 2 weeks
excerpt: I would like it to be possible to filter the information in the dashboard two weeks back, there are many companies that pay external employees/contractors every two weeks, so this view is necessary

posts.author: Nirg1 (Nir Gisin)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like it to be possible to filter the information in the dashboard two weeks back, there are many companies that pay external employees/contractors every two weeks, so this view is necessary

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Nirg1!

Would our advanced filters help you achieve this?

Screen Shot 2023-02-13 at 2.36.14 pm1228×812 69 KB

This way you can filter from the date 2 weeks prior and the current date.

Let me know your thoughts

posts.author: Nirg1 (Nir Gisin)
posts.cookedHtml: It could help momentarily, I would like to have a filter that would show me two weeks back at any given time

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: For sure - this makes perfect sense! Thanks for sharing this feature request - hopefully we can get some more eyes on it to increase those votes

posts.author: brianjw (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 - A better implementation of this request would be a text input “Relative Date” option that supports values like “Last 2 Weeks,” “Last Quarter,” or “Last 2 Quarters.” If you’re familiar with Salesforce Reports, that’s basically what I’m thinking of (screenshot included).
